sections.heading: Nguyên liệu · Ingredients
items: Water — to the first crease of your pointer finger when resting on the rice

sections.heading: Cách làm · Instructions
steps: To make broken rice from regular rice: soak the rice for 15 minutes.
Massage the rice gently to break the grains.
Cook using water to the level of half the first crease of your pointer finger — the usual Vietnamese finger measure.
